title: DfE update 26 November 2025
body: "Latest for further education     Article Title     Information R14 provisional qualification achievement rates for 2024 to 2025   Information Updates to the college financial planning handbook   Information Further education workforce and governor data collection – exceptional deadline extension   Reminder 2026 to 2027 high needs place change process     Latest information for academies     Article Title     Action Additional sessions of the DfE funded Chartered Institute of Procurement and Supply procurement fundamentals are available to book now   Information Early career framewor​k grant allocations for academic year 2024 to 2025   Information Net capacity assessment programme   Reminder 2026 to 2027 high needs place change process   Events and webinars Academies chart of accounts and automation Question and Answer drop-in session   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Automating your accounts return   Events and webinars Power Hour: Academies Accounts Return     Latest information for local authorities     Article Title     Action Additional sessions of the DfE funded Chartered Institute of Procurement and Supply procurement fundamentals are available to book now   Information Early career framewor​k grant allocations for academic year 2024 to 2025   Information Net capacity assessment programme   Reminder 2026 to 2027 high needs place change process   Reminder Early years 2025 autumn term data collection    "
